**About Intel**
Intel (Nasdaq: INTC) is an industry leader, creating world-changing technology that enables global progress and enriches lives. Inspired by Moore’s Law, we continuously work to advance the design and manufacturing of semiconductors to help address our customers’ greatest challenges. By embedding intelligence in the cloud, network, edge and every kind of computing device, we unleash the potential of data to transform business and society for the better. To learn more about Intel’s innovations, go to [newsroom.intel.com](https://newsroom.intel.de) and [intel.com](https://www.intel.com).

                // Select all Gravity Forms buttons with the class "gform_button button"
                const buttons = document.querySelectorAll('.gform_button.button');

                if (!buttons.length) return;

                console.log('Gravity Forms buttons found:', buttons);
                buttons.forEach((button) => {

                    // Remove the inline "onclick" attribute
                    button.removeAttribute('onclick');
                    button.classList.add('knockout');

                    // Rebind the onclick function programmatically
                    button.addEventListener('click', function(event) {
                        event.preventDefault(); // Prevent the default behavior
                        if (typeof gform !== 'undefined' && gform.submission) {
                            gform.submission.handleButtonClick(button); // Call the Gravity Forms handler
                        } else {
                            console.warn('Gravity Forms submission object not found.');
                        }
                    });

                });

            });</script>

<script nonce="">document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const gridButton = document.getElementById('grid-view');
    const listButton = document.getElementById('list-view');
    const postResults = document.querySelector('.post-results');

    // Get the saved view from localStorage or default to 'grid'
    const currentView = localStorage.getItem('view') || 'grid';
    applyView(currentView);

    // Handle Grid View Button Click
    gridButton.onclick = function () {
        applyView('grid');
        localStorage.setItem('view', 'grid');
    };

    // Handle List View Button Click
    listButton.onclick = function () {
        applyView('list');
        localStorage.setItem('view', 'list');
    };

    // Function to apply the view
    function applyView(view) {
        if (view === 'grid') {
            postResults.classList.remove('list-view');
            postResults.classList.add('grid-view');
            gridButton.classList.add('active');
            listButton.classList.remove('active');
        } else if (view === 'list') {
            postResults.classList.remove('grid-view');
            postResults.classList.add('list-view');
            listButton.classList.add('active');
            gridButton.classList.remove('active');
        }
    }

    // Update query parameter in the URL without reloading
    function updateQueryParam(key, value) {
        const url = new URL(window.location.href);
        url.searchParams.set(key, value);
        window.history.replaceState({}, '', url);
    }

    // Update pagination links to include the current view
    const paginationButtons = document.querySelectorAll('.pagination button');
    paginationButtons.forEach(button => {
        button.onclick = function () {
            const url = new URL(button.getAttribute('data-href'));
            url.searchParams.set('view', currentView);
            button.setAttribute('data-href', url.toString());
        };
    });
});</script>
